ddl.value: "nickname" is null or char_length(btrim("nickname")) between 1 and 80
ddl.name: contacts_nickname_length_check

ddl.value: "phone" is null or char_length(btrim("phone")) between 1 and 32
ddl.name: contacts_phone_length_check

ddl.value: "due_time" is null or "due_date" is not null
ddl.name: tasks_due_time_requires_date_check

ddl.value:
("course_id" is null or "work_category" = 'academic')
        and ("organization_id" is null or "work_category" = 'organization')
        and not ("course_id" is not null and "organization_id" is not null)
ddl.name: tasks_context_compatibility_check

ddl.value: "notes" is null or char_length(btrim("notes")) between 3 and 2000
ddl.name: tracked_accounts_notes_length_check
